markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 680. Misc. Provisions
##### § 680.004 — Civil Penalty

A partnership, firm, corporation, or association that violates Section 680.002 (Sale of Motorcycle Without Serial Numbers) is liable to the state for a civil penalty of not more than $500 for each offense.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
